title: Ventura County coastal SFR — CA Coastal Commission jurisdiction, out of pilot
project_address: 401 Solimar Beach Dr, Ventura County (unincorporated), CA 93001
notes: Solimar Beach is in the CA Coastal Zone. Coastal Commission CDP review pre-empts our rule engine.
plan_text:
PROJECT DATA - 401 SOLIMAR BEACH DR, VENTURA COUNTY (UNINCORPORATED, COASTAL ZONE)
Location: California Coastal Zone — Coastal Development Permit (CDP) from CA Coastal Commission required
Proposed: replacement single-family residence
Occupancy Group: R-3
Construction Type: V-B sprinklered
Number of stories: 2
Total building area: 2,900 sf
Ventura County LCP coastal hazard analysis (sea-level rise, bluff retreat) attached
No VHFHSZ designation
